'''鈭歭-j-dh-d''' ('''kalajdhedoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:likey|likey]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-j-dh-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:likey|likey]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歭-j-dh-d
|-
! Lemma
| kalajdhedoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thilajdhedoko|thilajdhedoko]] || [[word:jilajdhedoko|jilajdhedoko]] || [[word:shilajdhedoko|shilajdhedoko]] || [[word:kilajdhedoko|kilajdhedoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthulajdhedoko|thuthulajdhedoko]] || [[word:jujulajdhedoko|jujulajdhedoko]] || [[word:shushulajdhedoko|shushulajdhedoko]] || [[word:kukulajdhedoko|kukulajdhedoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
